text:
You are working on beads issue flt-it8.29: "Web session restoration" (P2 bug).

## Issue Details
The web app restores only a raw token on startup, never rehydrates the current user, and leaves capture/search routes effectively public until requests fail. Add session rehydration via me query, protected-route handling, and explicit logged-out UX for auth-required flows.

## WORKTREE SETUP — RUN FIRST
Before doing anything else, create and enter an isolated worktree:
```bash
REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"
BRANCH_NAME="worktree/web-session"
WORKTREE_DIR="$REPO_ROOT/.claude/worktrees/$BRANCH_NAME"

if [ -d "$WORKTREE_DIR" ]; then
  echo "Worktree already exists, reusing"
else
  git worktree add "$WORKTREE_DIR" -b "$BRANCH_NAME"
fi

cd "$WORKTREE_DIR"
```
Verify you are in the right place:
```bash
echo "CWD: $(pwd)"
echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current)"
echo "$(pwd)" | grep -q '\.claude/worktrees/' && echo "WORKTREE VERIFIED" || echo "FATAL: NOT in a worktree"
```
If verification fails, STOP and report the error to the team lead.

ALL subsequent commands must run from this worktree directory.
NEVER cd back to the main repo directory. Commit and push ONLY on your worktree branch — never touch main.

When done, push your branch:
```bash
git push -u origin HEAD
```

## Instructions
1. Read web/CLAUDE.md for frontend conventions (Mantine, gql.tada, etc.)
2. Read CLAUDE.md for overall project conventions
3. Find the current auth/session handling in web/src/ (likely a store or context)
4. Find the GraphQL schema for `me` query
5. Implement session restoration:
   - On app startup, if token exists in storage, query `me` to rehydrate user
   - Add loading state while session is being restored
   - Add ProtectedRoute component that redirects to login if not authenticated
   - Wrap capture/search routes with ProtectedRoute
   - Show explicit logged-out state for auth-required routes
6. Use gql.tada for all GraphQL queries (MANDATORY per web/CLAUDE.md)
7. Use Mantine components and style props (no Tailwind)
8. Write tests using renderWithMantine() from src/test/render.tsx

## Quality Gate (must pass before reporting done)
```bash
cd web && pnpm build && pnpm lint && pnpm test
```

## Completion
When done, commit all changes, push your branch, and report back with:
- Summary of changes made
- Quality gate results (paste output)
- Any concerns or follow-up items discovered
